name: @skylvi/veyl-cli
description: A complete and customizable JavaScript and TypeScript obfuscation utility

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @skylvi/veyl-config build && pnpm --filter @skylvi/veyl build && rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @skylvi/veyl-config build && pnpm --filter @skylvi/veyl build && tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit
